title: Consultation on Post-Notice of Compliance changes: Draft guidance for quality of veterinary drugs - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation on Post-Notice of Compliance changes: Draft guidance for quality of veterinary drugs

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from July 28, 2022 to September 26, 2022.
Health Canada is seeking feedback on a proposed draft guidance document for veterinary drug industry which has been transitioned from the Appendix 2 of the current Post-Notice of Compliance (NOC) Changes: Quality Document. The proposed draft guidance is intended to provide:
- guidance specific to veterinary drugs for easy and efficient navigation
- sufficient information on filing or notifying any post-market quality changes to veterinary drugs
- examples that help identify proposed quality changes with proper reporting categories and corresponding supporting data
The outcome will be a final guidance document that assists industry in classifying changes that affect product quality and submitting the appropriate supporting information, as applicable.

## Join in: how to participate
- Email us to request a copy of the Post-notice of compliance (NOC) changes: Draft guidance for quality of veterinary drugs.
- Email us your feedback with the subject line "Comments: Consultation on Post-notice of compliance (NOC) changes: Draft guidance for quality of veterinary drugs".

## Who is the focus of this consultation
This consultation is intended for veterinary drug industry stakeholders.

## Key questions for discussion
We are seeking feedback to ensure that this technical guidance is as clear as possible.
- Post-Notice of compliance (NOC) changes: Framework document for veterinary drugs
- Post-Notice of compliance (NOC) changes: Guidance for safety and efficacy of veterinary drugs
- Veterinary drugs - Management of regulatory submissions guidance
Email: consultationvdd-dmv@hc-sc.gc.ca
